title: Bellamy Attacks the Dreamers
description: Luffy ends Bellamy’s mockery with a single decisive blow, proving that dreams are not weakness.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami. Luffy ends Bellamy’s mockery with a single decisive blow, proving that dreams are not weakness.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: You're just jokin' around, right....!?...Say something!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Those two guys from during the day...

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Both have Mounties Higher Than You, Bellamy!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: I told you so, didn't I...

summary: Luffy ends Bellamy’s mockery with a single decisive blow, proving that dreams are not weakness.
